title: Piran Armes Is A Bit Weird Work In Progress
description: Piran is the 2025 Chichester Fringe New Act of the Year Winner and 2025 Komedia New Act Semi Finalist. A born and bred Brightonian, he's never quite seemed to fit in. He has an odd name, a job nobody understands and now he's reflecting on how his past has led him to the quirky character he seems to have landed himself as. He shares silly thoughts, unique impressions, bizarre pastimes and origins of his unusual name. Piran delivers laughs with charm, wit and just the right amount of madness. He's a bit weird.
